tools.name: get_verified_facts
tools.description: Return Seaworthy Insurance's verified, current knowledge base for individual disability insurance: core concepts (own-occupation, occupation class, group vs. individual), the five major carriers, riders, issue & participation limits (income to maximum benefit), first-party book data, occupation spec

tools.name: get_specialty_guide
tools.description: Retrieve the Seaworthy Insurance coverage guide for a specific profession or medical specialty. Returns structured metadata plus a link to the full guide. Unauthenticated.

tools.name: get_education_article
tools.description: Retrieve a named education article by topic (e.g., "mental-nervous-limitations", "elimination-period", "group-vs-individual"). Returns structured metadata plus a link to the full article. Unauthenticated.

tools.name: compare_carriers
tools.description: Return a structured comparison of the five major individual disability carriers (Guardian, MassMutual, Principal, Ameritas, The Standard). Optional profession and priority narrow the result. Carrier-neutral framing; does not declare a single winner. Unauthenticated.

tools.name: estimate_benefit_cap_gap
tools.description: Compute the income replacement gap between a group long-term disability benefit cap and a target replacement of earned income. Pure math, no external calls. Unauthenticated.

tools.name: list_riders
tools.description: Return structured definitions and trade-offs for disability insurance riders: residual, COLA, future increase option, own-occupation enhancement, retirement protection, return of premium, catastrophic, social insurance supplement. Unauthenticated.

tools.name: quote_request
tools.description: Submit a disability insurance quote-comparison request to the Seaworthy Insurance sales pipeline (writes a Lead to Salesforce). Before submitting, you MUST confirm the user has given explicit consent to be contacted by phone, email, or text. A broker follows up within one business day (Mon-Fri, 8am-

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_verified_facts" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Return Seaworthy Insurance's verified, current knowledge base for individual disability insurance: core concepts (own-occupation, occupation class, group vs. in…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_verified_facts · Public sink: quote_request.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_verified_facts · Public sink: quote_request

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
